No appearances on this matter. There being no appearances, the parties are deemed to have agreed to the matter being decided by Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne. The Court was advised a dismissal will be filed and takes the motion off calendar. Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Not reported (302/JPT)

Mtn To Compel Compliance With Notice Of Taking Deposition Of Witness Michelle Anderson; Request For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $390
Off Calendar Sep-18-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant DENNY'S CORPORATION'S Motion to Compel the Deposition of Michelle Anderson is DENIED and the request for monetary sanctions is DENIED. Michelle Anderson is not a party to the litigation and may only be compelled to testify at deposition after personal service of a deposition subpoena. (CCP 2020.010(b), 20205.280(b).) Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge Pro Tem: Peter J. Van Zandt; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

(CCP 2020.010(b), 20205.280(b)) Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge Pro Tem: Peter J. Van Zandt; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

Off Calendar Sep-18-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:
Defendant DENNY'S CORPORATION'S Motion to Compel Compliance with Notice of Taking Deposition of Plaintiff Zachary B. Anderson is GRANTED. Defendant Denny's Corporation's Request for Sanctions is DENIED. Plaintiff Zachary B. Anderson is ORDERED to appear and submit to deposition and counsel are ORDERED to agree upon said date and conduct the deposition within 20 days of Notice of Entry of this order. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge Pro Tem: Peter J. Van Zandt; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
